videos.youtube_description:
[ONE-LINE LESSON SUMMARY PLACEHOLDER]

This is Lesson 1 of Module 01: Welcome — Meet Zuri & The Order Metaphor, in the Tax Prep Pro Setup Guide.

Narrated by Zuri, an AI training avatar (HeyGen). Instruction sourced from Tax Prep Pro configuration documentation.

Where this lesson lives: this video is part of the Tax Prep Pro Setup Guide inside the Tax Prep Pro member portal. To complete the lesson and check off the steps, log into your portal at https://taxpreppro.virtuallaunch.pro.

Disclaimer: This content is for educational purposes and does not constitute legal or tax advice.
